analysis_commentary: self_play_target_tau 0.8→0.6 with warmup=0 and scaling flags=false ALSO ran anomalously slow (95 steps, first probe t=179s). This rules out warmup and the new scaling flags as the slow-start cause — four consecutive iterations now exhibit the anomaly regardless of new-param settings. max [0.037, 0.24], illegal pinned 0.998-0.9996, aboveU=0. Can't judge target_tau's effect with so few training steps.
